Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED. Moving party to prepare order and judgment.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
